behavior: Scans dataPath/dbc locales, validates default locale, calls LOAD_DB2 for 324 runtime stores, performs version sentinel checks, then builds DB2Manager lookup indexes.
notes: ArtifactQuestXP store is defined but not loaded here.

behavior: Validates DB2 metadata against C++ record size, loads default-locale DB2 file, overlays hotfix DB rows, loads extra locale files and locale hotfix rows, registers table hash.
notes: This is the behavioral gate Rust must reproduce before individual stores are considered complete.

behavior: Loads base DB2 file from dataPath/dbc/<locale>/<file>, materializes records and string pool.
notes: Rust has a generic WDC4 parser but no central DB2Storage equivalent.

behavior: Calls DB2DatabaseLoader for main hotfix rows using the store DB2LoadInfo statement.
Executes HOTFIX_SEL_* and HOTFIX_SEL_*_MAX_ID; merges custom/non-custom records into index table.
notes: Rust HotfixStatements is placeholder, so this path is absent.

behavior: Executes HOTFIX_SEL_*_LOCALE and fills localized DB2 string slots per locale.
notes: Locale hotfix overlay is absent in Rust.

behavior: Loads client hotfix metadata for SMSG_HOTFIX_* tracking.
notes: Rust has raw blob cache for Item/ItemSparse only, not full C++ hotfix metadata containers.

behavior: Loads hotfix blob payloads indexed by table hash, record id and locale.
notes: Rust cache is file-derived for a narrow set, not DB-driven equivalent.

behavior: Loads optional hotfix metadata by table hash, record id and locale.
Applies in-memory record fixups and records client-visible hotfixes via InsertNewHotfix.
Loads M2 cinematic camera data after DB2 stores.
notes: Related DataStores asset path, separate from DB2Storage registry.
